calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue For Sister State Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.'S Motion To Change Venue For Sister State Judgment.

Citibank, N.A.'s unopposed "motion to change venue for sister state judgment" is granted. Citibank shall pay any and all transfer costs.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
